subcodes.first_line: O Jamshid! The Cup of Jamshíd is that which circleth round at the feast of the Covenant, and the goblet of the Pledge is that which, in the gathering [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای جمشید جام جم است که در بزم میثاق بدور آمده و پیمانه پیمانست که در انجمن
subcodes.subjects: @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
